title: nothing-new-under-the-sun recommendation
description: Structured form of the eight-section recommendation output emitted by the nothing-new-under-the-sun skill.

context.description: The six context answers plus constraints established before search.

tier_search.description: The REUSE / USE / FORK / BUY / INTEGRATE / BUILD search with citations.

evidence_matrix.description: One row per viable candidate. Every column must be filled.

recommendation.description: One tier or a compound set of tiers.

why_this_wins.description: Concrete reasons tied to the five long-term-value components.

confidence.description: Confidence rubric outcome. One-way doors require HIGH.

re_evaluation_trigger.description: Date, scale, event, or failure mode that forces re-evaluation.

missing_information.description: Unknowns that matter, as prose or a list.
